Dear X:  I am sorry to inform you that we are unable to admit you to the Ph.D. Program at the Tepper School of Business.  We admit only a very small number of students each year and the competition is always strong. As in past years; we have received quite a large number of applications; and were only able to accept a small number of students across the various fields of study within the school.  This large number; in addition to the fact that applicants can choose up to three areas of study; means that our review process can sometimes take longer than expected.  I am certain that you will find a productive setting in which to continue your studies among the many other good graduate schools; and I wish you success in your subsequent professional career.   Best regards;  Lawrence Rapp Director PhD Student Services
